nodes.label: Meera Mascot - Meerkat/Prairie Dog Character Illustration

properties.description: A flat-style vector illustration of a cute, friendly meerkat or prairie dog character sitting upright on green grass, waving with one paw raised. The character has a round body with warm tan/beige tones, dark brown eyes, small ears, and a friendly smile. The illustration uses a flat design aesthetic with simple shapes and limited shading, typical of a mascot or brand character. This appears to be the Meera application mascot, likely named after or representing the app itself.
properties.color_palette: warm browns, tan, beige, dark brown accents, green grass
